description: VEED is a web-based video creation and editing platform with AI features such as avatars, lip sync, subtitles, and background removal. It also offers a Fabric MCP integration that lets AI assistants generate videos through VEED.
summary: VEED exposes an OAuth-protected MCP server at https://www.veed.io/api/v1/mcp for Fabric video-generation workflows; its public API marketing pages otherwise point developers to VEED-branded models hosted on fal.ai rather than a separate VEED-hosted REST/GraphQL API or CLI.
